task: SafeClaw final hardening round 2 - Agent A Auth/Archive/Reopen

checks.name: dispatch archive logs link to exact workpack reopen route when workpack_id exists
checks.evidence: app/api/dispatch-logs/route.ts now emits /documents?workpackId=<encoded-id> for linked dispatch logs and /dispatch only when no workpack_id exists.

checks.name: workpack archive entries use one clear reopen/edit route
checks.evidence: app/api/workpacks/route.ts emits /documents?workpackId=<encoded-id> for reopenHref and editHref so the user lands on the hydration-capable documents route.

checks.name: archive UI empty and fallback states explain local vs server history
checks.evidence: app/archive/page.tsx copy distinguishes server workpack absence, local recent work, linked dispatch workpack reopen, and dispatch-only fallback.

checks.name: documents route reports hydration progress, success, and exact blockers
checks.evidence: components/CurrentWorkpackModules.tsx shows loading, ready, and blocked notices for workpackId reopen, including archive/workspace recovery actions on blocked states.

checks.name: production build
checks.blocker: Next build compiles successfully, then fails during page-data/build-manifest collection with .next ENOENT and Failed to collect page data for /api/workers. This remains outside the auth/archive/reopen file scope.
